---
title: "LQAS Data Dashboard"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    theme: flatly
    code_folding: show
    df_print: paged
params:
  data_file: "data/final/combined.qs"
  run_date: !r Sys.Date()
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(DT)
library(knitr)
library(qs)

# Load data
if (file.exists(params$data_file)) {
  dt <- qread(params$data_file)
  data_available <- TRUE
} else {
  dt <- data.table()
  data_available <- FALSE
}
```

# 📊 LQAS Data Dashboard

**Generated:** `r params$run_date`
**Data Source:** `r params$data_file`
